requirement_summary: Requirements apply only within defined boundaries
Authority MUST be declared at execution time
Decisions MUST bind to accountable roles
Absence of evidence MUST be detectable
Human regulator MUST detect incoherent signals without internalizing them
evidence_type: Audit transcript showing early pattern recognition

requirement_summary: Human regulator MUST terminate invalid signals prior to escalation
Corrective signals MUST restore coherence not persuade
Regulator MUST return to baseline after enforcement
Regulator MUST NOT assume authority over system or subject
